purpose: Pinned cycle-0 prior-knowledge profiling plus exact local FlowTune build-source verification for paper-aligned Planning, Flow, and Logic agent prompts.

repositories.name: berkeley-abc
repositories.description: Upstream command wrappers, technology-independent algorithms, orchestration prototype, build registration, and equivalence commands.
repositories.quality: Authoritative upstream implementation and the closest semantic/API reference for the bundled FlowTune fork.
repositories.extensibility: High: module.make boundaries, stable command registration patterns, and explicit algorithm parameter structures.
repositories.self_evolution_synergy: Very high: exposes reached decision points, orchestration hooks, invariants, and per-pass statistics suitable for one-hypothesis candidates.
repositories.abc_integration: Native ABC; APIs must still be checked against the older pinned FlowTune fork before reuse.

repositories.name: flowtune
repositories.license: No top-level license file detected; reference and locally bundled research code only
repositories.description: The exact local ABC fork and FlowTune integration that candidates compile against; source of truth for available APIs and command reachability.
repositories.quality: Directly relevant research implementation with a pinned local revision; older than current upstream ABC and unevenly documented.
repositories.extensibility: Medium: integrates as ABC commands and preserves the single-binary model, but includes research-driver coupling.
repositories.self_evolution_synergy: Very high: it is the executable candidate source tree and contains Bayesian flow/orchestration precedents.
repositories.abc_integration: Full in-tree ABC fork; this is the only reference repository that is also the assignment-controlled build source.

repositories.name: mockturtle
repositories.description: Well-factored rewriting, refactoring, resubstitution, cleanup, don't-care, and statistics interfaces across multiple network types.
repositories.quality: Mature, documented, strongly typed C++ library with explicit parameter/statistics contracts and tests.
repositories.extensibility: Very high: generic network views, resynthesis functors, callbacks, and separable parameter/statistics objects.
repositories.self_evolution_synergy: High: offers clear examples of bounded parameters, decision hooks, observability, and deterministic fallbacks.
repositories.abc_integration: No direct API compatibility with ABC C code; patterns must be translated, never copied mechanically.

repositories.name: lsoracle
repositories.category: logic synthesis orchestration and learned optimization
repositories.description: Composable AIG optimization scripts combining cut rewriting, refactoring, resubstitution, balancing, and adaptive selection.
repositories.quality: Research-quality implementation from an established logic-synthesis group, with concrete command and algorithm compositions.
repositories.extensibility: High at the orchestration level: passes are composed behind reusable scripts and command wrappers.
repositories.self_evolution_synergy: Very high: directly demonstrates multi-pass schedules, bandit/oracle choices, and depth-aware variants.
repositories.abc_integration: Built primarily on mockturtle/C++; use schedules and evidence patterns, not its APIs or dependencies, in ABC.

repositories.name: yosys
repositories.category: RTL synthesis and production ABC integration
repositories.description: Production examples of invoking ABC, choosing scripts, moving networks across process boundaries, logging, cleanup, and preserving frontend semantics.
repositories.quality: Widely used production synthesis framework with strong command, diagnostics, and regression conventions.
repositories.extensibility: High: pass framework and script selection are explicit, though data models differ substantially from ABC internals.
repositories.self_evolution_synergy: Medium-high: valuable for robust orchestration, default-vs-custom script handling, failure reporting, and integration invariants.
repositories.abc_integration: Full external-process and linked-ABC integration; useful for boundaries and scripts, not for direct algorithm code transplantation.

repositories.name: openroad-flow-scripts
repositories.category: end-to-end open-source EDA flow and metric harness
repositories.description: Evaluation-flow, synthesis-script, metric-reporting, reproducibility, and autotuning precedents for separating optimization from trustworthy measurement.
repositories.quality: Production-oriented reference flow with CI, explicit metrics, design configurations, and reproducible stage boundaries.
repositories.extensibility: High at harness level: scripts, variables, metrics, and tuning layers are separated.
repositories.self_evolution_synergy: High for evaluation discipline and feedback artifacts; low for direct ABC internal code changes.
repositories.abc_integration: Uses Yosys/ABC in a larger physical-design flow; read only for script and measurement patterns.

repositories.name: kitty
repositories.description: Focused truth-table operations, care-aware decomposition, ISOP/ESOP construction, and deterministic NPN canonicalization for bounded cut-function reasoning.
repositories.quality: Compact EPFL logic-synthesis library with explicit type/size contracts, documentation, and tests.
repositories.extensibility: High at the Boolean-function layer: operations and representations are separated behind small typed interfaces.
repositories.self_evolution_synergy: High for cut-function analysis, support reduction, decomposition feasibility, and reproducible cache or tie-break signatures.
repositories.abc_integration: C++ truth-table APIs are not compatible with ABC C; transfer mathematical patterns only and keep the local FlowTune API authoritative.

repositories.name: alice
repositories.category: logic-synthesis command shell and state orchestration
repositories.description: Command registration, typed state stores, validation, histories, and structured logging patterns from the EPFL logic-synthesis ecosystem.
repositories.quality: Compact documented command-shell library with clear extension points and tests.
repositories.extensibility: Very high at interface level: commands, stores, logging, and frontends are cleanly separated.
repositories.self_evolution_synergy: High for auditable pass dispatch, explicit state handoff, precondition checks, and machine-readable observations in iterative agents.
repositories.abc_integration: Its C++ DSL is not ABC's Cmd_CommandAdd/frame API; reuse separation and observability patterns, never the dependency or macros.

repositories.name: cudd
repositories.category: decision-diagram Boolean algorithms and resource discipline
repositories.description: Mature BDD/ADD/ZDD implementation covering cofactor, composition, decomposition, reordering, satisfiability, caching, ownership, and consistency checks.
repositories.quality: Established C package with stable contracts, internal assertions, canonical caches, and explicit memory ownership.
repositories.extensibility: Medium-high: public manager policy is separated from operations, but canonical-node invariants are deliberately strict.
repositories.self_evolution_synergy: High for bounded cofactor/decomposition reasoning, deterministic recursive progress, allocation failure handling, and fail-closed cleanup.
repositories.abc_integration: CUDD nodes, unique tables, reference counts, caches, and reordering differ from ABC AIGs; never transplant APIs or add a dependency.

repositories.name: eqy
repositories.category: formal equivalence orchestration and proof lifecycle
repositories.description: Yosys equivalence-checking driver with explicit prepare, partition, strategy, proof, logging, status aggregation, and counterexample phases.
repositories.quality: Actively maintained YosysHQ formal tool with documented configurations, examples, durable artifacts, and unambiguous outcomes.
repositories.extensibility: High at verification-workflow level: proof strategies, partitions, job dependencies, and fallbacks are explicit.
repositories.self_evolution_synergy: Very high for correctness-first fan-out/fan-in, all-settled review, timeout provenance, and preservation of failure evidence.
repositories.abc_integration: EQY validates Yosys netlists with external engines; it is a lifecycle reference and cannot replace the project's ABC baseline-vs-candidate CEC gate.
